name: Coconut Dream Bars
recipeIngredient: Quaker Oats, uncooked: 3/4 cup (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugar together until creamy.
2. Sift together flour, soda, and salt.
3. Add the sifted mixture to the creamed mixture; blend well.
4. Stir in the oats.
5. Pat the batter into a greased 11 x 7-inch baking pan.
6. For the topping, beat eggs slightly.
7. Blend in remaining ingredients for the topping.
8. Pour the topping over the base.
9. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 30 minutes.
10. Cool; cut into bars.
